results.title: Periocular dermatitis: a report of 401 patients.
results.abstract: Periocular contact dermatitis may appear as contact conjunctivitis, contact allergic and/or irritative eyelid and periorbital dermatitis, or a combination of these symptoms. The clinical symptoms may be induced by several environmental and therapeutic contact allergens.
results.journal: Journal of the European Academy of Dermatology and Venereology : JEADV
